product.name: DaisyBase
product.description: Custom Java 21 relational database system with embedded, server, JDBC, installer, and demo-business surfaces.

modules.name: common
modules.responsibility: Shared types, values, identifiers, and primitive contracts.

modules.name: sql-frontend
modules.responsibility: Parser, AST, diagnostics, and reference PL/SQL bridge.

modules.name: catalog
modules.responsibility: Durable metadata for schemas, tables, indexes, routines, sequences, users, roles, and grants.

modules.name: planner
modules.responsibility: Binding, parameter inference, logical planning, and physical selection.

modules.name: execution
modules.responsibility: Runtime operators, DML, joins, aggregates, routines, and generated-key flows.

modules.name: storage
modules.responsibility: Paged heap persistence, overflow storage, page images, and recovery-facing state.

modules.name: txn
modules.responsibility: Transactions, snapshots, savepoints, and XA branch state.

modules.name: wal
modules.responsibility: WAL append, metadata, checkpoints, and restart primitives.

modules.name: engine-api
modules.responsibility: Embedded runtime, transport, metadata, sequences, routines, and XA integration.

modules.name: cli
modules.responsibility: Interactive shell and operator entry point.

modules.name: jdbc
modules.responsibility: JDBC driver, metadata, callable support, updatable result sets, and XA APIs.

modules.name: orm
modules.responsibility: Annotation-based entity mapping, CRUD helpers, schema introspection, and source generation.

modules.name: installer
modules.responsibility: Core installer, demo installer, and packaging helpers.

modules.name: demo-business-app
modules.responsibility: TomEE enterprise demo using DaisyBase and the JDBC driver.

modules.name: testkit
modules.responsibility: Test utilities and reusable engine fixtures.

surfaces.name: embedded-engine
surfaces.description: In-process engine API for applications, tests, and benchmarks.

surfaces.name: server
surfaces.description: Remote access over the DaisyBase binary protocol.

surfaces.name: cli
surfaces.description: Interactive shell for SQL execution and explain workflows.

surfaces.name: jdbc
surfaces.description: JDBC driver for embedded and remote DaisyBase usage.

surfaces.name: orm
surfaces.description: Annotation-driven entity mapping, repository helpers, and schema-to-code generation over JDBC.

surfaces.name: installer
surfaces.description: Windows and Linux installers with GUI and headless paths.

surfaces.name: demo-business-app
surfaces.description: TomEE-hosted backend and frontend demo enterprise application.

docs.title: Building an App with JDBC and ORM

mcpServers.name: daisybase-system-mcp
mcpServers.responsibility: Machine-readable map of the documented DaisyBase product surface.

mcpServers.name: daisybase-orm-mcp
mcpServers.responsibility: Schema introspection and ORM code generation tools exposed over MCP.

knownLimits: SQL breadth remains intentionally bounded and explicitly documented as such.
Storage and recovery are real but still have evolution runway.
Installer upgrade-in-place and uninstall are not yet fully automated.
XA and security are implemented but bounded in enterprise depth.
The PL/SQL bridge is an overlap aid rather than blanket PL/SQL compatibility.
